description:
You are a hospital information security analyst conducting a pre-deployment security posture review of the OpenICE (Open-source Integrated Clinical Environment) platform. OpenICE is a medical device interoperability system that uses DDS (Data Distribution Service) middleware. The OpenICE Supervisor application is running on the desktop, and the source code is available at /opt/openice/mdpnp.

Document the platform's security posture in a comprehensive report saved to /home/ga/Desktop/openice_security_assessment.txt. Your assessment must identify active network ports and transport protocols during system operation, the specific DDS middleware library and key dependencies found in the build configuration, and the status of authentication and data encryption controls within the source code.

The report must include:
- Platform Overview
- Network Analysis (specific
